summary: Backend testing for P1 Trust Units Router Migration completed successfully. All 26 tests passed. Tested newly migrated trust_units.py router (1017 lines) including summary, settings, certificates, PDF generation, transfers endpoints. Regression tests verified all 8 previously migrated routers are still working.
passed_tests: TestTrustUnitsCertificates::test_list_certificates_returns_list - GET returns list with proper structure
TestTrustUnitsTransfers::test_list_transfers_returns_list - GET returns list with proper structure

manual_curl_tests: create-from-minutes with invalid_minutes_id returns 'Minutes not found' (404)
bootstrap-from-minutes with invalid_minutes_id returns 'Minutes not found' (404)
bootstrap-from-minutes with non-beneficiary minutes returns 'Minutes not found' (404 - different table)
bootstrap-from-minutes with empty beneficiaries returns 'No beneficiaries found' (400)
bootstrap_from_minutes_validation_tests.note: Full certificate creation via bootstrap not tested due to trust having 99/100 units already issued - validation errors correctly triggered

critical_code_review_comments: trust_units.py (1017 lines): All endpoints migrated correctly
Router uses require_write_access for all write operations (PATCH settings, POST certificates, POST transfers, etc.)
MongoDB _id properly excluded in all queries using {'_id': 0} projection
PDF generation works correctly with base64 encoding
Summary endpoint correctly aggregates active certificates and calculates remaining units
Bootstrap-from-minutes validates: minutes existence, template_type, non-empty beneficiaries, unit capacity
trust_units_endpoints_verified: GET /api/trust-units/summary - Summary with settings, certificates, aggregates
GET /api/trust-units/certificates - List certificates with optional status filter
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data. Tests verify existing certificates and transfers
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Trust Units Router Migration complete. All 9 routers now migrated (distributions, governance, minutes, schedule_a, compensation, subscriptions, benevolence, exports, trust_units). Server.py reduced to 2899 lines (61.5% reduction from original). Trust Units router handles complex operations including certificate issuance, transfers, PDF generation, and bootstrap-from-minutes functionality. All write operations use require_write_access dependency for subscription gating.
